package Christmas morning rip it open what's there spread it out poke at it look at it much better they like getting stuff in packages they like surprises extra book they didn't expect article with a handwritten note jotted on top of it they didn't expect a kakatchka a postcard when you go on a trip they like getting surprises they like new and interesting things to do not necessarily the most productive things to do and even if they haven't implemented the 47 things you already gave them they need a 48th you can't keep drilling on the 47 they won't be happy that might be the most effective thing you could do it might be the most productive thing you could do but nothing's productive if you lose them you can't help them if they're not there so if you got 47 good things for them to do and they've only gotten to number 12 and they haven't you still got to give them a 48 you still got to give them a 49th you still got to give them a 50th they got to have something new they want what's new they don't want what they already got they don't want what you've already showed them they don't want what's old even if the best thing everybody could do is spend time drilling it they want what's new okay and they hop if you don't give it to them they'll go hop to another dog who's waving the next new flavor I got something new over here I think I have something new we figured that I had a multi-level company for a while that I inherited because they couldn't pay it's a long story but and I had been in Amway so I already learned the message from Amway you got to have a new product every month otherwise you don't keep anybody interested you know how many products do you need when I left Amway we had 4,000 somehow products our own multi-level company we had more products than we had distributors but we had to have a new product all the time new product new product new product right how about let's sell the product we got now a new product publishing industry our publisher they got to have 50 you books every quarter how about the seller ones you got they're only a year old we've only sold 40,000 copies of them there's 12 million people I mean couldn't we sell some more of those now new title new title new title now those are smart people running big companies the behavior doesn't matter gotta have something new toys they love toys got to give them toys things things you know quizzes questionnaires little pieces of software squeezy balls toys they like toys like them a lot being sent on goose chases and treasure hunts because activity now masquerades is accomplishment so here's five web web websites go home and look at these web websites oh great home look at the websites the guy did some activity masquerading is a company love gone on goose chase to see don't don't download everything and give it to them make them go get it make them call over here to get stuff sent to them they like that a lot here's three places to call up and get them to send you their catalogs and their stuff because now they get three packages oh boy I got three more packages right activity that feels like accomplishment right they want accomplishment but most don't want to do everything necessary to have a lot of accomplishment a little bit of accomplishment is usually enough to satisfy most people okay but they want to feel like they heard a lot of accomplishment so you got to design activity that feels like accomplishment right so like getting a USP wrote a whole session on getting a unique selling proposition see that feels like accomplishment well it isn't unless you do something with the unique selling proposition but it feels like accomplishment because you wrote one and you got one good food especially desserts the cookies are real important very important that coaching cookies brownies desserts all the other food gets sucked by the way as long as the desserts are okay they'll tell it as long as the desserts are good they'll be happy but if you don't have any desserts for them they'll be unhappy and then the whole thing is all about positive feelings do they feel better about themselves and do they feel good about the experience and do they feel good about him been there been involved for whatever period of time it was if they do you got this is the stuff that makes people happy not any real sophisticated list it's a list nonetheless next list is almost as useful what are positive feelings here's some examples okay you go stroking gold stars everybody likes gold stars here's understand what everybody's still doing at
